data.title: Jacob Bridgeman Breaks Down in Tears as Amanda Balionis Asks Personal Question After $4M Win
data.description: Jacob Bridgeman grew up watching Riviera Country Club on TV as a kid. On Sunday, he left as its champion, with Tiger Woods handing him the trophy and $4 million in his pocket.
